purpose: Track normalized completion, cumulative maturity and progress toward 100% engineering readiness across all HBHS-EP waves.

completion_interpretation.rule: Completion is normalized by engineering maturity, not artifact count alone.
completion_interpretation.warning: Visual proliferation without proof closure reduces true completion confidence.
completion_interpretation.preferred_behavior: Earlier waves should stabilize before downstream maturity acceleration occurs.

next_targets: Reach 50+ engineering plots with maintained governance maturity
